overall.description: First-person perspective from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player interacting with a wall-mounted TV inventory system in a modern luxury apartment. The screen transitions from a text menu to a rotating 3D character model, with warm afternoon light streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the city.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a modern luxury apartment with warm golden hour light flooding through floor-to-ceiling windows. A wall-mounted TV displays a clothing inventory menu, while a wooden desk below holds a remote control and decorative items. The city skyline is visible in the distance through the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: character customization interface with 3D model viewer

UI navigation arrows and slider bars appear on screen edges

horizontal slider bars for adjusting view

segments.scene_description: The TV display transitions to show a 3D character model of a woman in a long coat against a white studio background. The character rotates slowly as UI elements including slider bars and navigation arrows appear on screen. The player appears to be browsing clothing options in the inventory system.

scene_state.functional_zone: virtual showroom with reflective corridor environment

events.description: background on TV changes from white studio to virtual futuristic corridor

agents.ego_description: viewing the character model in the virtual environment setting

entered.detail: futuristic hallway with dark walls and ceiling lights on TV screen
shiny reflective surface beneath the character model
overhead stage lights in the virtual environment

segments.scene_description: The TV screen now displays the character model within a virtual futuristic corridor featuring reflective flooring and dramatic overhead lighting. The environment creates a showroom effect for viewing the clothing, replacing the previous plain white background while maintaining the same character pose and rotation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective within a luxury apartment as a wall-mounted interface transforms from a static menu into an immersive virtual showroom. It begins with warm golden hour light flooding the room through floor-to-ceiling windows, overlooking a distant city skyline while a clothing inventory menu is displayed on the screen above a wooden desk. As the interface updates, the menu shifts to a rotating 3D character model of a woman in a long coat set against a plain white studio background with active UI sliders and navigation arrows. The scene then evolves as the white backdrop dissolves, placing the character within a futuristic virtual corridor featuring reflective flooring and dramatic overhead lighting. This transition completes the shift from the physical warmth of the apartment to a sterile, high-tech digital environment for viewing clothing.
